chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4748 of 2023 along with C.P.Nos.D-4631 & 5611 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 16.01.2025 M/s.Rana Azam-ul-Hassan & Muhammad Khalid Naseem, Advocates for the Petitioners Mr.Salman Yousuf, Advocate for the Respondent No.3 (in C.P.No.D- 4631/2023). Mr.Abid H. Shaban, Advocate along with Mr.Imtiaz Ali and Ms.Naveeda Basharat, Advocates for Respondent No.2 (in C.P.No.D-4748/2023) Mr.Adnan Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent (Federal Tax Ombudsman) Ms.Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly stated that the controversy involved in these petitions has been addressed by this Court in order dated 23.12.2024 rendered in C.P.No.D-1680/2024, therefore, by mutatis mutandis application of the aforesaid order, these petitions be dismissed. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in above listed petitions. Judge Judge nasir
